name: Language-Aware Images
description: TMDB images in your library's language with a clean fallback to English — no more textless posters.
overview: Drop-in replacement for the built-in TMDB image provider. Enforces a clean cascade: library language → English → (optional) textless. Within each bucket images are sorted by vote_count DESC like TMDB's own /images UI. Fixes jellyfin/jellyfin#9878 (built-in prefers textless over English fallback).
changelog: MinimumVoteCount default lowered from 1 to 0 — vote_count=0 entries are often legitimate language matches that just haven't been voted on.
